category_title: ADHD-diagnosed student who seeks social contact and struggles with exclusion and medication-dependent behavior
minimal_context: The student is transitioning to the playground with his classmates after the lunch bell rings.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: The bell just rang for the end of lunch. Everyone, please run out into the playground.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Forgets to take his medicine and runs out into the playground.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Go ahead and find something to do with your classmates.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Grabs his classmates, holds their necks and twists their arms around.)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (After a boy tells him to stop and the classmates distance themselves from him, he stands alone and stares into the sky.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: The bell just rang for the end of lunch. Everyone, please run out into the playground.

STUDENT: (Forgets to take his medicine and runs out into the playground.)

TUTOR: Go ahead and find something to do with your classmates.

STUDENT: (Grabs his classmates, holds their necks and twists their arms around.)

TUTOR: What is happening over there?

STUDENT: (After a boy tells him to stop and the classmates distance themselves from him, he stands alone and stares into the sky.)

context.time_context: When the bell rings after lunch

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Jacob forgets to take his medicine
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Jacob grabs his classmates, holds their necks and twists their arms around

behavior_patterns.condition: A boy tells Jacob to stop and classmates distance themselves from him thereafter
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Jacob is alone and stares into the sky
related_quotes: he feels outside the classroom community.
